title: Total Cholesterol (TC) Protocol
author: Peter Havel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ygeftte

steps.title: Add 5 µl of calibrator and sample to each well
steps.instruction: Add 5 µl of calibrator and sample to each well.

steps.title: Add 300 µl of reagent to each well
steps.instruction: Add 300 µl of reagent to each well. Incubate at 37°C for 5 minutes. Read at 540 nm.

steps.title: Subtract blank readings from final readings
steps.instruction: Subtract blank readings from final readings. The assay will be linear so the unknown samples can be calculated as (Sample Absorbance ÷ Calibrator Absorbance) × Calibrator Concentration.
